page.title: General Indications for hot spring use

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:一般的適応症]]
'''General Indications''' (一般的適応症, Ippanteki Tekioshō) refer to the diseases and injuries for which all {{ill|Onsen|lt=therapeutic hot springs|ja|温泉#療養泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onsen|1=Onsen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q655311}} (onsen) are considered effective, as stipulated in the notification issued by the Director-General of the Natural Environment Bureau, Ministry of the Environment (Heisei 26 Year, Circular No. 1407012).
The antonym is '''General Contraindications''' (一般的禁忌症, Ippanteki Kinkishō), which will also be discussed in this article.
== General Indications ==
* Chronic pain or stiffness in muscles or joints (e.g., {{ill|Rheumatoid arthritis|en|Rheumatoid arthritis|qid=Q187255|lt=rheumatoid arthritis|1=Rheumatoid arthritis}} , osteoarthritis, lower back pain, neuralgia, frozen shoulder, contusions, sprains in their chronic phases) * Muscle stiffness in cases of motor paralysis * Cold sensitivity * Peripheral circulatory disorders * Decline in gastrointestinal function (e.g., bloating, gas accumulation in the intestines) * Mild hypertension * Impaired glucose tolerance (diabetes) * Mild hypercholesterolemia * Mild asthma or emphysema * Hemorrhoidal pain * Autonomic nervous instability * Stress-induced symptoms (e.g., sleep disorders, depressive states) * Post-illness recovery * Fatigue recovery * Health promotion
== General Contraindications ==
* Active stages of diseases (especially during fever) * Active tuberculosis * Advanced malignant tumors or severe anemia with extreme physical weakness * Severe heart or lung diseases causing shortness of breath with minimal activity * Severe kidney diseases accompanied by edema * Gastrointestinal bleeding * Visible bleeding * Acute exacerbation of chronic diseases
== Related Articles ==
* {{ill|Onsen water qualities|ja|泉質|1=Hot Spring Types|1=Hot Spring Types|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onsen water qualities|13=User:Immanuelle/Hot Spring Types|qq=}}
* {{ill|Balneotherapy|en|Balneotherapy|qid=Q2016490|lt=Balneotherapy|1=Balneotherapy}}
== References ==
* {{Cite web|format=PDF|url=https://www.env.go.jp/nature/onsen/docs/kyokucho.pdf|title=Standards for the Indication of Contraindications and Precautions for Bathing or Drinking Based on Article 18, Paragraph 1 of the Onsen Law|publisher=Ministry of the Environment|editor=Director-General of the Natural Environment Bureau|date=2014-07-01|accessdate=2016-12-12}}
== External Links ==
* {{Cite web|url=http://www.spa.or.jp/hyakkka/7.htm|title=Indications and Contraindications - Onsen Encyclopedia|publisher=Japan Spa Association|accessdate=2016-12-12}}
{{onsen-stub}}
{{Onsen}}
